name: section-header
title: Section Header
description: Title + description + right-aligned actions row for dashboard panels and page sections, with heading semantics and an optional count badge.

props.name: title
props.description: Required section title, rendered as a heading.

props.name: info
props.description: Info affordance beside the title — an icon button with a Tooltip.

props.name: as
props.description: Heading level for the a11y tree.

clinicalNotes: Choose the `as` heading level to keep a correct document outline — a screen-reader user navigating a chart by headings depends on it (page title h1 → panel headers h2). The count badge is announced with the title, so keep it meaningful (e.g. number of active problems), not decorative.
notes: Layer-M0 scaffolding. Used by widget-panel and directly in list panels.
